_comment: Maps E-PRTR Annex I sector/subsector codes to SNAP proxy flags. Derived from eprtr_AnnexIActivity parsed to (Sector, SubSector). Each entry sets the named flag column to 1 in the E-PRTR GeoDataFrame.
_proxy_rasters: Only Snap1, Snap34, and Snap9 generate proxy raster files (lu_snap1.tif, lu_snap34.tif, lu_waste.tif). Snap6 and Snap10 flags are assigned but no proxy raster is generated from them in the current implementation.

Snap1.description: Thermal power stations and other combustion installations
Manufacture of coal products and solid smokeless fuel

Snap34.description: Surface treatment of metals and plastics
Production of cement clinker or lime
Manufacture of glass including glass fibre
Production of plant health products and biocides
Production of explosives and pyrotechnic products
Production of pulp from timber or similar fibrous materials
Production of paper, board and other primary wood products
Preservation of wood and wood products with chemicals
Treatment and processing of animal and vegetable materials

Snap9.description: Installation and recovery or disposal of hazardous waste
Disposal or recycling of animal carcasses and animal waste
Independently operated industrial waste-water treatment plants

Snap6.description: Pretreatment or dyeing of fibres or textiles
Production of carbon or electro-graphite by incineration or graphitization
Building, painting or removal of paint from ships

Snap10.description: Intensive rearing of poultry or pigs

corine_fallback._note: 3-digit CORINE Code_18 values from the GDB vector layer used as fallback when no E-PRTR point falls inside a polygon. Agriculture codes fill snap9; industrial/construction codes fill snap34 and snap1. Matches lines 1677-1687 of the original proxies script. Keys must be lowercase to match the column names assigned by _assign_snap_to_corine (snap9, snap34, snap1).
corine_fallback._snap9_supplement_note: When omit_snap9_agriculture_fallback is true (or build uses --eprtr-waste-plus-corine-no-ag), snap9 is not filled from the agriculture snap9 list; optional non-ag Code_18 list here instead.
